superuser_moves_top_25.what: Auto-loaded context file defining project facts, architecture, commands
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: /init to generate, # key to add entries during session
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Start of every project, updated continuously as project evolves
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Token bloat if too verbose; use @imports and .claude/rules/ for modularity

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Claude creates detailed plan for approval before making any changes
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Complex tasks, unfamiliar codebases, high-stakes changes
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: May auto-enable acceptEdits mode after approval; explicitly disable if unwanted

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Run long-running commands in background while Claude continues working
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Ctrl+B when command is running (press twice for tmux users)
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Dev servers, build tools, test runners, docker, terraform
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Need to retrieve output manually via TaskOutput tool

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Reusable prompt templates invoked with /command-name, supports $ARGUMENTS
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Frequent atomic tasks: testing, commits, scaffolding, project-specific workflows
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Restart Claude after creating/editing commands

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Non-interactive mode for piping and automation
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Code reviews in pipelines, automation scripts, data processing workflows
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: No interactive clarifications; must provide complete context upfront

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Specialized Claude instances with restricted tools and separate context
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: /agents to configure, Claude auto-delegates based on description
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Code review, security scans, testing - isolated tasks that pollute main context
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Cannot spawn other subagents; background subagents can't ask clarifying questions

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Pre-approve specific tools/commands to eliminate permission prompts
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Add to settings.json: permissions.allow array, or --allowedTools flag
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Trusted operations, workflow automation, team standards
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Deny rules override allow; order matters in permission hierarchy

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Filesystem + network isolation for autonomous operation without risk
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Prompt injection concerns, untrusted repos, autonomous agent workflows
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: May need to allow specific paths/domains; reduces prompts by 84% but adds config overhead

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Claude spends more reasoning tokens before responding
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Tab key to toggle, or include 'think' in prompt
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Complex refactors, multi-step reasoning, formal verification, algorithm design
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Higher token cost, slower responses; overkill for routine tasks

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Directly reference files without waiting for Claude to search
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Type @ and use autocomplete to select file path
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Specific file edits, focused analysis, avoiding context pollution
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: None - pure efficiency gain

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Persistent task tracking with blockers and dependencies across sessions
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Set CLAUDE_CODE_TASK_LIST_ID env var, use TaskCreate/TaskUpdate tools
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Complex projects, parallel workstreams, multi-agent orchestration
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Tasks persist in ~/.claude/tasks/, not project-specific unless configured

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Summarize conversation to reduce token usage while preserving key decisions
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Before long tasks, near context limits, to maintain session continuity
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Early instructions may be lost; prefer CLAUDE.md for persistent rules

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Auto-run commands at lifecycle events (e.g., format on PostToolUse)
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: /hooks command or edit settings.json hooks field
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Auto-formatting, linting, testing, commit message validation
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Stop/SubagentStop hooks use blocking:false by default to prevent loops

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Integrate external APIs, databases, docs via Model Context Protocol
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: claude mcp add server-name, or /mcp command in session
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Access live data, proprietary APIs, specialized tools not built-in
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: OAuth required for many remote servers; stdio transport more reliable than HTTP

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Auto-loaded knowledge packages triggered by context
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: Create SKILL.md in ~/.claude/skills/ with descriptive frontmatter
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Security patterns, API design, testing conventions - expertise that applies conditionally
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Description field is critical for auto-loading; keep focused to avoid loading irrelevant skills

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Claude navigates browser, reads console, tests UIs without manual verification
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Frontend development, UI testing, design verification vs Figma
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Requires paid plan, no WSL support, needs Chrome extension installed

superuser_moves_top_25.what: @claude mentions in PR/issue comments trigger automated implementations
superuser_moves_top_25.when: PR feedback automation, issue-to-PR conversion, CI error fixes
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret; respects CLAUDE.md for standards

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Replace system prompt to change tone, personality, teaching style
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Pair programming (Learning), documentation (Explanatory), custom workflows
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Loses default coding instructions unless keep-coding-instructions:true

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Roll back conversation and/or code state to previous point
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Bad generation, wrong direction, experimental changes to undo
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Code rewind may not catch all file system changes

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Modal editing for prompt crafting with h/j/k/l navigation
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Vim users who want muscle memory in prompts
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Subset of Vim - not all commands supported

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Run shell commands directly without Claude interpreting
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Quick shell access, adding command output to context
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Output added to conversation - can bloat context with verbose commands

superuser_moves_top_25.what: See exactly what's consuming your token budget as colored grid
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Debugging context issues, optimizing token usage, before compaction
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: None - pure insight tool

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Run parallel Claude sessions on different branches/features
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: git worktree add ../feature-a, then cd and run claude in each
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Parallel feature development, A/B testing approaches
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: Each session has separate context; use CLAUDE_CODE_TASK_LIST_ID to share tasks

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Claude highlights active file, syncs with editor state
superuser_moves_top_25.trigger: /ide command after starting claude in IDE terminal
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Prefer graphical IDE but want Claude's power
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: VS Code extension vs terminal mode have different UX; choose one workflow

superuser_moves_top_25.what: Programmatic access to Claude Code's agent loop, tools, context management
superuser_moves_top_25.when: Building custom agents: email assistant, code reviewer, research agent
superuser_moves_top_25.pitfalls: V2 SDK in development; V1 stable but may have breaking changes
